title: T7 Self-learning: design-lint → Shelly fold + census bench verify
prompt: Execute the David-ratified fold (decisions.md Q9): move design-lint's judgment half into Shelly as her automated self-review mode. Copy ~/dev/ad/apps/dark-factory/tools/design-lint/RUBRIC.md verbatim (plus a provenance header) into ~/dev/ad/appydave-plugins/appydave/skills/shelly/references/design-lint-rubric.md; add a lint-render command to Shelly's SKILL.md (input = screenshot PNG, apply the rubric's two tests and ONLY its four flags — cool-on-content, missing-warm-anchor, amber-orange-on-brown, colour-overload — return the rubric's JSON verdict; hard guardrails carry verbatim: flags only, no auto-fix, never police diagram/colour counts) plus YAML triggers; add one paragraph in Mochaccino SKILL.md's Review Command section naming lint-render as the automated sibling of human review (never a gate). Demote dark-factory tools/design-lint/ to a staging remnant: RUBRIC.md becomes a pointer stub, README gets a FOLDED banner, shoot-one.py and out/ untouched. Second half: verify on disk whether mocha-census bench-mode / export-to-file / generator-seam ever landed (authoring recon 2026-07-06 says all three did NOT — bench is README-planned only, ratings export is still a clipboard copy button, no spec/exemplar wiring in the render skills) and record the three verdicts. Close backlog/2026-06-10-design-lint-placement-question.md as .done.md with a resolution + the census record. Bump appydave plugin.json minor version, commit and push BOTH repos with surgical diffs. Build NOTHING new — no bench mode, no batch workflow, no generator wiring, no live lint run. Read and execute the war game at backlog/wargames/T7-10-design-lint-shelly-fold.md. Follow its moves in order; on any failure signal apply the counter-move; on any abort condition stop and write needs-decision/.
verify: In ~/dev/ad/appydave-plugins: appydave/skills/shelly/references/design-lint-rubric.md exists with a 'Folded from dark-factory' provenance header and all four flag codes (cool-on-content, missing-warm-anchor, amber-orange-on-brown, colour-overload); shelly/SKILL.md has a '### lint-render' command with 'lint this render' among its YAML triggers, flags-only/no-auto-fix/never-count guardrails intact, and frontmatter still parsing; mochaccino/SKILL.md's Review Command section mentions lint-render exactly twice; plugin.json version >= 6.2.0; committed and pushed with only the four ticket files staged. In ~/dev/ad/apps/dark-factory: tools/design-lint/RUBRIC.md is a MOVED pointer stub, README.md carries a FOLDED banner, shoot-one.py and out/ are untouched; backlog/2026-06-10-design-lint-placement-question.md is renamed .done.md containing a Resolution section plus the three-line 'Census claims verified' record (bench mode / export-to-file / generator seam each marked NOT landed, or LANDED/PARTIAL with path evidence if execution-time recon contradicts authoring); committed and pushed. Negative: no mocha-census .py/.sh changed (README only if a claim flipped), docs/david-design-patterns.md and engine/ untouched, no bench/batch/generator code written anywhere, no Playwright lint actually run.
